wrongside_verdict: not_testable (geometry needs motion; single stills) → Tier 2
tier: tier_2 (promote to learned classifier on this dataset if baseline < §7)
note: Zero-shot wrong-side verdict is not computable from a still (rule engine abstains). Detector localizes vehicles at the recall above → solid base for the Phase-5 learned-classifier escalation. OBB angle kept as a heading proxy.
